lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਧ ਪਠਾਏ ਆਪਿ ਹਰਿ ਹਮ ਤੁਮ ਤੇ ਨਾਹੀ ਦੂਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: saadh patthaae aap har ham tum te naahee door |
lines.english: The Lord Himself sent His Holy Saints, to tell us that He is not far away.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਭ੍ਰਮ ਭੈ ਮਿਟਿ ਗਏ ਰਮਣ ਰਾਮ ਭਰਪੂਰਿ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak bhram bhai mitt ge raman raam bharapoor |2|
lines.english: O Nanak, doubt and fear are dispelled, chanting the Name of the all-pervading Lord. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਰੁਤਿ ਸਿਸੀਅਰ ਸੀਤਲ ਹਰਿ ਪ੍ਰਗਟੇ ਮੰਘਰ ਪੋਹਿ ਜੀਉ ॥
lines.translit: rut siseear seetal har pragatte manghar pohi jeeo |
lines.english: In the cold season of Maghar and Poh, the Lord reveals Himself.

lines.gurmukhi: ਛੰਤੁ ॥
lines.translit: chhant |
lines.english: Chhant:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਲਨਿ ਬੁਝੀ ਦਰਸੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਬਿਨਸੇ ਮਾਇਆ ਧ੍ਰੋਹ ਜੀਉ ॥
lines.translit: jalan bujhee daras paaeaa binase maaeaa dhroh jeeo |
lines.english: My burning desires were quenched, when I obtained the Blessed Vision of His Darshan; the fraudulent illusion of Maya is gone.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭਿ ਕਾਮ ਪੂਰੇ ਮਿਲਿ ਹਜੂਰੇ ਹਰਿ ਚਰਣ ਸੇਵਕਿ ਸੇਵਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: sabh kaam poore mil hajoore har charan sevak seviaa |
lines.english: All my desires have been fulfilled, meeting the Lord face-to-face; I am His servant, I serve at His feet.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਾਉ ਭਗਤਿ ਗੋਵਿੰਦ ਬਾਂਛਤ ਜਮੁ ਨ ਸਾਕੈ ਜੋਹਿ ਜੀਉ ॥
lines.translit: bhaau bhagat govind baanchhat jam na saakai johi jeeo |
lines.english: I long for loving devotion to the Lord of the Universe, and so the Messenger of Death cannot even see me.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਾਰ ਡੋਰ ਸੀਗਾਰ ਸਭਿ ਰਸ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਉ ਅਲਖ ਅਭੇਵਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: haar ddor seegaar sabh ras gun gaau alakh abheviaa |
lines.english: My necklaces, hair-ties, all decorations and adornments, are in singing the Glorious Praises of the unseen, mysterious Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ॥
lines.translit: salok |
lines.english: Salok:

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨਵੰਤਿ ਨਾਨਕ ਪ੍ਰਭਿ ਆਪਿ ਮੇਲੀ ਤਹ ਨ ਪ੍ਰੇਮ ਬਿਛੋਹ ਜੀਉ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: binavant naanak prabh aap melee teh na prem bichhoh jeeo |6|
lines.english: Prays Nanak, God has united me with Himself; I shall never suffer separation from my Beloved again. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਧਨੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਸੋਹਾਗਣੀ ਡੋਲਤ ਨਾਹੀ ਚੀਤ ॥
lines.translit: har dhan paaeaa sohaaganee ddolat naahee cheet |
lines.english: The happy soul bride has found the wealth of the Lord; her consciousness does not waver.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਦ ਬਿਨੋਦ ਅਨੰਦ ਕੋਡ ਪ੍ਰਿਅ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਮ ਸੰਗਿ ਬਨੇ ॥
lines.translit: naad binod anand kodd pria preetam sang bane |
lines.english: With her Beloved Husband Lord, she enjoys millions of melodies, pleasures and joys.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਤ ਸੰਜੋਗੀ ਨਾਨਕਾ ਗ੍ਰਿਹਿ ਪ੍ਰਗਟੇ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਮੀਤ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: sant sanjogee naanakaa grihi pragatte prabh meet |1|
lines.english: Joining together with the Saints, O Nanak, God, my Friend, has revealed Himself in my home. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਛੰਤੁ ॥
lines.translit: chhant |
lines.english: Chhant:

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਿਮਕਰ ਰੁਤਿ ਮਨਿ ਭਾਵਤੀ ਮਾਘੁ ਫਗਣੁ ਗੁਣਵੰਤ ਜੀਉ ॥
lines.translit: himakar rut man bhaavatee maagh fagan gunavant jeeo |
lines.english: The snowy winter season, the months of Maagh and Phagun, are pleasing and ennobling to the mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨ ਬਾਂਛਤ ਫਲ ਪਾਇਆ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਮ ਭਨੇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: man baanchhat fal paaeaa har naanak naam bhane |2|
lines.english: The fruits of the mind's desires are obtained, O Nanak, chanting the Lord's Name. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਖੀ ਸਹੇਲੀ ਗਾਉ ਮੰਗਲੋ ਗ੍ਰਿਹਿ ਆਏ ਹਰਿ ਕੰਤ ਜੀਉ ॥
lines.translit: sakhee sahelee gaau mangalo grihi aae har kant jeeo |
lines.english: O my friends and companions, sing the songs of joy; my Husband Lord has come into my home.

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਣੁ ਤ੍ਰਿਣੁ ਤ੍ਰਿਭਵਣ ਭਏ ਹਰਿਆ ਦੇਖਿ ਦਰਸਨ ਮੋਹੀਆ ॥
lines.translit: van trin tribhavan bhe hariaa dekh darasan moheea |
lines.english: The woods, the meadows and the three worlds have blossomed forth in their greenery; gazing upon the Blessed Vision of His Darshan, I am fascinated.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗ੍ਰਿਹਿ ਲਾਲ ਆਏ ਮਨਿ ਧਿਆਏ ਸੇਜ ਸੁੰਦਰਿ ਸੋਹੀਆ ॥
lines.translit: grihi laal aae man dhiaae sej sundar soheea |
lines.english: My Beloved has come into my home; I meditate on Him in my mind. The bed of my heart is beautifully adorned.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਿਲੇ ਸੁਆਮੀ ਇਛ ਪੁੰਨੀ ਮਨਿ ਜਪਿਆ ਨਿਰਮਲ ਮੰਤ ਜੀਉ ॥
lines.translit: mile suaamee ichh punee man japiaa niramal mant jeeo |
lines.english: I have met my Lord and Master, and my desires are fulfilled; my mind chants His Immaculate Mantra.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨਵੰਤਿ ਨਾਨਕ ਨਿਤ ਕਰਹੁ ਰਲੀਆ ਹਰਿ ਮਿਲੇ ਸ੍ਰੀਧਰ ਕੰਤ ਜੀਉ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: binavant naanak nit karahu raleea har mile sreedhar kant jeeo |7|
lines.english: Prays Nanak, I celebrate continuously; I have met my Husband Lord, the Lord of excellence. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਤ ਸਹਾਈ ਜੀਅ ਕੇ ਭਵਜਲ ਤਾਰਣਹਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: sant sahaaee jeea ke bhavajal taaranahaar |
lines.english: The Saints are the helpers, the support of the soul; they carry us cross the terrifying world-ocean.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ॥
lines.translit: salok |
lines.english: Salok:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭ ਤੇ ਊਚੇ ਜਾਣੀਅਹਿ ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਮ ਪਿਆਰ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: sabh te aooche jaaneeeh naanak naam piaar |1|
lines.english: Know that they are the highest of all; O Nanak, they love the Naam, the Name of the Lord. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਤਿਨ ਬਲਿਹਾਰਣੈ ਹਰਿ ਜਪਿ ਉਤਰੇ ਤੀਰ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak tin balihaaranai har jap utare teer |2|
lines.english: Nanak is a sacrifice to those who meditate on the Lord, and cross over to the other shore. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨ ਜਾਨਿਆ ਸੇਈ ਤਰੇ ਸੇ ਸੂਰੇ ਸੇ ਬੀਰ ॥
lines.translit: jin jaaniaa seee tare se soore se beer |
lines.english: Those who know Him, cross over; they are the brave heroes, the heroic warriors.

lines.gurmukhi: ਛੰਤੁ ॥
lines.translit: chhant |
lines.english: Chhant:

lines.gurmukhi: ਚਰਣ ਬਿਰਾਜਿਤ ਸਭ ਊਪਰੇ ਮਿਟਿਆ ਸਗਲ ਕਲੇਸੁ ਜੀਉ ॥
lines.translit: charan biraajit sabh aoopare mittiaa sagal kales jeeo |
lines.english: His feet are exalted above all. They eradicate all suffering.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਵਣ ਜਾਵਣ ਦੁਖ ਹਰੇ ਹਰਿ ਭਗਤਿ ਕੀਆ ਪਰਵੇਸੁ ਜੀਉ ॥
lines.translit: aavan jaavan dukh hare har bhagat keea paraves jeeo |
lines.english: They destroy the pains of coming and going. They bring loving devotion to the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਰੰਗਿ ਰਾਤੇ ਸਹਜਿ ਮਾਤੇ ਤਿਲੁ ਨ ਮਨ ਤੇ ਬੀਸਰੈ ॥
lines.translit: har rang raate sehaj maate til na man te beesarai |
lines.english: Imbued with the Lord's Love, one is intoxicated with intuitive peace and poise, and does not forget the Lord from his mind, even for an instant.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਜਿ ਆਪੁ ਸਰਣੀ ਪਰੇ ਚਰਨੀ ਸਰਬ ਗੁਣ ਜਗਦੀਸਰੈ ॥
lines.translit: taj aap saranee pare charanee sarab gun jagadeesarai |
lines.english: Shedding my self-conceit, I have entered the Sanctuary of His Feet; all virtues rest in the Lord of the Universe.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੋਵਿੰਦ ਗੁਣ ਨਿਧਿ ਸ੍ਰੀਰੰਗ ਸੁਆਮੀ ਆਦਿ ਕਉ ਆਦੇਸੁ ਜੀਉ ॥
lines.translit: govind gun nidh sreerang suaamee aad kau aades jeeo |
lines.english: I bow in humility to the Lord of the Universe, the treasure of virtue, the Lord of excellence, our Primal Lord and Master.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨਵੰਤਿ ਨਾਨਕ ਮਇਆ ਧਾਰਹੁ ਜੁਗੁ ਜੁਗੋ ਇਕ ਵੇਸੁ ਜੀਉ ॥੮॥੧॥੬॥੮॥
lines.translit: binavant naanak meaa dhaarahu jug jugo ik ves jeeo |8|1|6|8|
lines.english: Prays Nanak, shower me with Your Mercy, Lord; throughout the ages, You take the same form. ||8||1||6||8||

lines.gurmukhi: ੴ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ॥
lines.translit: ik oankaar satigur prasaad |
lines.english: One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਮਕਲੀ ਮਹਲਾ ੧ ਦਖਣੀ ਓਅੰਕਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: raamakalee mahalaa 1 dakhanee oankaar |
lines.english: Raamkalee, First Mehl, Dakhanee, Ongkaar:

lines.gurmukhi: ਓਅੰਕਾਰਿ ਬ੍ਰਹਮਾ ਉਤਪਤਿ ॥
lines.translit: oankaar brahamaa utapat |
lines.english: From Ongkaar, the One Universal Creator God, Brahma was created.

lines.gurmukhi: ਓਅੰਕਾਰੁ ਕੀਆ ਜਿਨਿ ਚਿਤਿ ॥
lines.translit: oankaar keea jin chit |
lines.english: He kept Ongkaar in his consciousness.

lines.gurmukhi: ਓਅੰਕਾਰਿ ਸੈਲ ਜੁਗ ਭਏ ॥
lines.translit: oankaar sail jug bhe |
lines.english: From Ongkaar, the mountains and the ages were created.

lines.gurmukhi: ਓਅੰਕਾਰਿ ਬੇਦ ਨਿਰਮਏ ॥
lines.translit: oankaar bed nirame |
lines.english: Ongkaar created the Vedas.
